data.title: POP Culture spends $33 million to buy 300 Bitcoins
data.description: Nasdaq-listed POP Culture announced that it has spent $33 million to buy 300 bitcoins. The company is building a diversified cryptocurrency fund pool focusing on investing in assets such as BTC, ETH and BOT.

data.title: Solmate to launch $300 million SOL Treasury project in UAE
data.description: According to market sources: Solmate will launch a $300 million SOL treasury project in the UAE, led by a former partner of Pantera Capital.

data.title: Plasma will distribute 25 million XPL to some early users
data.description: According to official information, after the launch of the Plasma Mainnet Beta, the Plasma team will distribute an additional 25 million XPL tokens to reward users who complete Sonar verification and participate in the public sale with small deposits. An additional 2.5 million XPL tokens have been reserved for existing and future members of the Stablecoin Alliance.

data.title: Nasdaq Reaches New Record High Amid Market Gains
data.description: According to PANews, the Nasdaq index rose by 1% on September 18, setting a new all-time high. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 index increased by 0.67%, and the Dow Jones Industrial Average climbed by 0.35%.

data.title: SEC Rule Change Sets Stage for Wave of Crypto ETFs
data.description:
This week, the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission made its first serious move to change that.
source: https://coindoo.com/sec-rule-change-sets-stage-for-wave-of-crypto-etfs/

data.title: Nasdaq-listed company SunCar plans to invest $10 million in cryptocurrency
data.description: SunCar, a Nasdaq-listed company, announced that its board of directors has authorized the purchase of $10 million in selected major cryptocurrencies that are expected to benefit from the rapid growth of risk-weighted asset (RWA) tokenization. Strategically, SunCar believes that blockchain integration and RWA tokenization represent a natural evolution of its AI-based cloud technology for digital auto insurance and automotive services. (Businesswire)

data.title: Waller, a potential successor to Fed Chair Powell, appeared satisfied with a 25 basis point rate cut.
data.description: Economists at Bank of America, led by Barve, pointed out that Waller, the top candidate to succeed Powell, seemed satisfied with a 25 basis point rate cut. Barve said: "We believe that Waller has dispelled concerns that his turn to dovishness in recent months was politically motivated rather than economically motivated. Whether this will have an impact on his candidacy for Fed chairman remains to be seen." However, this will not make the challenges facing the Fed in the near term any easier. With tariff-related inflationary pressures increasing and the labor market deteriorating rapidly, the internal debate is likely to be very intense. "Policymakers remain strongly divided on the pros and cons of further easing, setting the stage for fierce votes in the last two meetings of the year," said Samuel Tombs, chief U.S. analyst at Panson Macro. (Jinshi)

data.title: First XRP ETF Debuts In The U.S.
data.description:
The first exchange-traded fund (ETF) that tracks the XRP (CRYPTO: $XRP) %Cryptocurrency has launched in the U. S. On Sept. 18, REX Shares and Osprey Funds are debuting the first U. S. -listed ETF tied
source: http://www.yolowire.com/latestarticles/21352/first-xrp-etf-debuts-in-the-us

data.title: Plasma plans to hold a TGE on September 25th
data.description: Tether-backed Plasma announced that it plans to hold TGE on September 25. The mainnet test version will be launched together with the native token XPL. XPL will become the eighth largest stablecoin blockchain. It is expected that $2 billion worth of stablecoins will be put into use on the first day of launch. The funds will be deployed in more than 100 DeFi partner platforms, including Aave, Ethena, Fluid, Euler, etc.

data.title: Bitwise CEO: Cryptocurrency will reshape the capital market, and this is just the beginning
data.description: Bitwise CEO Hunter Horsley stated in a post on the X platform that crypto credit and lending will explode over the next 6-12 months. The main reasons are as follows: 1. The value of cryptocurrencies is approaching $4 trillion and growing: when people can use these cryptocurrencies as collateral to borrow rather than sell, they will do so. 2. In the United States alone, the market capitalization of publicly issued stocks exceeds $60 trillion. With the tokenization of assets, someone with $7,000 in stocks will be able to borrow against them for the first time. Hunter Horsley also stated, "Cryptocurrencies will reshape capital markets. We are just beginning."

data.title: All stolen gold in Hong Kong has been recovered
data.description: Hong Kong police announced today that gold valued at approximately HK$50 million was recovered from a gold and jewelry processing factory in Hung Hom on September 17. The case remains under investigation by the West Kowloon Crime Squad.

data.title: Solana Treasury Firm DFDV Launches Treasury Accelerator Program
data.description: DFDV, the Nasdaq-listed Solana Treasury company, has announced the launch of its Treasury Accelerator program, Treasury Accelerator. Treasury Accelerator will now fund additional Digital Asset Treasurys (DATs) directly using the company’s balance sheet, with each DAT potentially deploying an additional $5 million to $75 million, funded in cash or in-kind Solana. Any appreciation from these investments is expected to be reinvested in the purchase of additional Solana, thereby increasing the company’s treasury holdings.

data.title: Bullish rose 8.9% in pre-market trading, possibly due to the release of its first financial report after listing.
data.description: Bullish, a cryptocurrency exchange, surged 8.9% in pre-market trading Thursday after releasing its first earnings report since going public in August. The company reported adjusted revenue of $57 million and diluted earnings per share of 93 cents in the second quarter.

data.title: REX-Osprey launches Dogecoin ETF (DOJE) and XRP ETF (XRPR) in the United States
data.description: REX-Osprey, a strategic partnership between REX Shares and Osprey Funds, has announced the launch of the REX-Osprey™ DOGE ETF (CBOE: DOJE) and the REX-Osprey™ XRP ETF (CBOE: XRPR). These are the first US-listed exchange-traded funds offering spot exposure to Dogecoin and XRP. (Businesswire)

data.title: Initial jobless claims cool, but data confusion may resurface
data.description: The latest employment data shows that initial unemployment claims in the United States have fallen back to a nearly four-year range after a surge the previous week. The decline in initial claims reflects a correction in Texas' previously "inexplicable surge" in claims—a surge clearly linked to hiring and firing changes among educators in the state. Continuing unemployment claims (those who continue to receive benefits after an initial claim) are also declining, but remain above the "Maginot Line" threshold of 1.9 million. Will this data trend prompt Powell and the Federal Reserve to reduce their "easing bias"? Perhaps the "data-driven" drama is about to begin again. (Jinshi)

data.title: US-listed company Watson Financial plans to deploy a cryptocurrency treasury strategy and establish an advisory committee
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Waton Financial announced the establishment of a cryptocurrency advisory committee to develop its treasury strategy. The advisory committee will guide Waton's strategic expansion into the cryptocurrency sector, overseeing and evaluating all cryptocurrency projects, including providing crypto reserves, digital asset libraries, and institutional-grade solutions for clients seeking to invest in cryptocurrencies and tokenized assets. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Anti-fraud company SEON completes $80 million Series C financing, led by Sixth Street Growth
data.description: Anti-fraud company SEON announced the completion of an $80 million Series C financing round, led by Sixth Street Growth, with participation from IVP, Creandum, Firebolt and new investor Hearst. The new round of financing brings SEON's total financing to $187 million, including a $94 million Series B financing round raised in 2022. The company's two founders once established a cryptocurrency platform that supports fiat currency transactions in Central and Eastern Europe. SEON will also cope with the increasingly complex digital environment in related fields. Currently, SEON serves customers in various industries, including cryptocurrencies, games, financial institutions, and e-commerce. Its customers include Patreon, Revolut, NuBank, Ladbrokes, Air France, and KLM. With the help of new funds, they hope to reach more customers and provide them with effective but budget-friendly fraud prevention solutions. (Techfundingnews)

data.title: Binance Wallet Aspecta BuildKey Mode TGE Phase 1 to Launch RIVER
data.description: The first Binance Wallet Aspecta BuildKey TGE will list Riverdot Inc (RIVER). Eligible users must use Alpha Points to participate. Details and event entry will be announced soon. BuildKey subscription period: September 19, 2025, 3:00 PM – 5:00 PM (UTC+8); BuildKey trading period: September 19, 2025, 5:00 PM – September 22, 2025, 5:00 PM (UTC+8); TGE & BuildKey exchange period: September 22, 2025, 5:00 PM (UTC+8). Note that token prices will fluctuate during a Bonding Curve-based TGE. The Bonding Curve liquidity pool will maintain its liquidity for a period after the TGE, but liquidity may decline over time.

data.title: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending September 13 was 231,000, while the expected number was 240,000.
data.description: Initial jobless claims in the U.S. for the week ending September 13th were 231,000, compared to expectations of 240,000 and revised from 263,000 to 264,000. Continuing claims in the U.S. for the week ending September 6th were 1.92 million, compared to expectations of 1.95 million and revised from 1.939 million to 1.927 million. The four-week moving average of initial jobless claims in the U.S. for the week ending September 13th was 240,000, revised from 240,500 to 240,750. (Jinshi)

data.title: Thumzup Media Corporation spent approximately $2 million to purchase 7.5 million DOGE
data.description: Donald Trump Jr., the eldest son of President Trump, has invested in a Nasdaq-listed company called Thumzup Media Corporation, which holds cryptocurrency reserves. The company announced it has spent approximately $2 million to purchase 7.5 million DOGE, adding Dogecoin to its strategic reserves. (PRNewswire)
